project_type: Next.js 15 App Router full-stack marketplace platform
build_system: pnpm with Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS v4, Shadcn UI
test_framework: Vitest (unit) + Playwright (e2e) - to be set up
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm build to verify TypeScript compilation and Next.js build. 2. Run pnpm lint to check code quality.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can access npm registry and common package sources. Node.js v22 available. pnpm available. No Docker daemon needed for build validation.
contribution_requirements: Greenfield project - establishing conventions from scratch.
key_patterns: Feature-based architecture. App Router with server components by default. Zustand for client state. Supabase for backend. Framer Motion for animations. React Three Fiber for 3D. Shadcn UI for component primitives.
directory_structure: src/app/ (routes), src/components/ (ui, layout, sections, marketplace, dashboard, auth, moderation, animations, effects, 3d), src/features/, src/hooks/, src/stores/, src/actions/, src/services/, src/lib/, src/middleware/, src/types/, src/config/, src/styles/, src/utils/, src/constants/
